variants: Lynette Rowan is a prominent inventor currently based in Fletcher's Edge. She hails from Seraphim Path, where her interests in innovation first blossomed. Notably, she created the Vermillion Phase Mixer, an invention that earned her the esteemed Wavecrest Trophy. Alongside her professional achievements, Lynette is an engaged member of the Ivyvine Spinners Society, cultivating her passion for design among a community of fellow creatives.
